name: 身份反差鉤子
description: 男主突然出現向女主求婚，打破觀眾對女主「被拋棄」的預期，製造巨大的命運反轉懸念。觀眾會好奇為什麼豪門繼承人會主動求婚。

examples.drama_title: 💔Unloved girl no longer tries to please biased family &  makes them cry! KDrama【ENG SUB】【FULL】
examples.excerpt: 「也許我沒有說得很清楚。余志婉，我是來跟你談婚論嫁的...我的未婚妻從頭到尾都只有你」

examples.drama_title: Reborn, my sister forced groom swap, so I married wild officer, tamed him, was spoiled like princess
examples.excerpt: 這雙眼睛清澈純淨，並沒有我想象中的慌張。我所收集到的情報，與溫柔怯弱的大小姐形象相去甚遠。／這身手遠非沉溺酒色之人所能及。

examples.drama_title: 上輩子被太子虐死，重生後我主動嫁給昏迷的皇叔。
examples.excerpt: （字幕資料不足，基於標題推斷）標題中『太子』vs『昏迷的皇叔』的對比本身即為核心反差鉤子。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: Did he actually buy my entire product line? Is this guy a fan of mine? / If only he knew half the perfume products in his house were my designs. He'd be shocked. I have some basic knowledge.

examples.drama_title: 身懷異香的少女被衆人覬覦，怎知每當有男人靠近她一步上古蛇王就吃醋到失控，清除她身邊所有異性只准看他一人！短劇 #甜寵 #先婚後愛 #總裁灰姑娘
examples.excerpt: My name is Fu Yuan / tonight / It is this gentleman and his wife / Wedding Night / It's you. / It makes it impossible for me to marry a man. / Unable to succeed to the position of Saintess

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: I suffer from a private ailment... As soon as I get close to a woman, I feel nothing but disgust. If I touch one, I tremble all over, feeling nauseous and sick... However, Laura Lake is the exception. When I am intimate with her, I don't feel disgusted.
